MINORIS-CARD001_STRIKE.title: Strike
MINORIS-CARD002_DEFEND.title: Defend
MINORIS-CARD003_INSTINCT_SCRATCH.title: Instinct Scratch
MINORIS-CARD004_INTUITIVE_DODGE.title: Intuitive Dodge
MINORIS-CARD005_WHIP.title: Whip
MINORIS-CARD006_CHASE.title: Chase
MINORIS-CARD006_CHASE.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. If your last card played was an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain{Energy:energyIcons()}.
MINORIS-CARD007_SPIN_STRIKE.title: Spin Strike
MINORIS-CARD008_IMPROVISED_STRIKE.title: Improvised Strike
MINORIS-CARD008_IMPROVISED_STRIKE.descri: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Add another card with "Strike" in its name to your [gold]Hand[/gold]
MINORIS-CARD009_TESTING_BLOW.title: Testing Blow
MINORIS-CARD010_QUADRACUT.title: Quadracut
MINORIS-CARD010_QUADRACUT.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage to ALL enemies. Return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD011_PRECISE_SCRATCH.title: Precise Scratch
MINORIS-CARD012_SLAM.title: Slam
MINORIS-CARD013_AMBUSH.title: Ambush
MINORIS-CARD013_AMBUSH.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Play a "Scratch" Attack in your hand
MINORIS-CARD014_FULL_SCRATCH.title: Full Scratch
MINORIS-CARD015_BOOMERANG.title: Boomerang
MINORIS-CARD015_BOOMERANG.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Put this on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]
MINORIS-CARD016_SUPERSONIC.title: Supersonic
MINORIS-CARD017_ELEGANT_SCRATCH.title: Elegant Scratch
MINORIS-CARD017_ELEGANT_SCRATCH.descript: Deal 2 damage 2 times. This combat, "Scratch" Attacks deal +{ScratchAmp:diff()}damage.
MINORIS-CARD018_TIP_OVER.title: Tip Over
MINORIS-CARD019_SOBEK_STRIKE.title: Sobek Strike
MINORIS-CARD020_CALL_OF_JACKAL.title: Call of the Jackal
MINORIS-CARD020_CALL_OF_JACKAL.descripti: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage{Hits:diff()}times. Each time you play this, it hits 1 additional time this combat.
MINORIS-CARD021_MASTER_CRAFT.title: Master Craft
MINORIS-CARD022_JUSTICE.title: Justice
MINORIS-CARD022_JUSTICE.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Exhaust ALL 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. For each exhausted card, gain +{BonusPerCard:diff()}damage and +{BonusPerCard:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD023_SOLAR_FLARE.title: Solar Flare
MINORIS-CARD023_SOLAR_FLARE.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Exhaust 1 card from your hand. Reduce this card's cost this combat by that card's cost.
MINORIS-CARD024_HURRICANE_STRIKE.title: Hurricane Strike
MINORIS-CARD025_SUN_LENS.title: Sun Lens
MINORIS-CARD025_SUN_LENS.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage to ALL enemies. If an enemy is killed, gain{Energy:energyIcons()}.
MINORIS-CARD026_DIVINE_LIGHT.title: Divine Light
MINORIS-CARD026_DIVINE_LIGHT.description: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. For each "Scratch" Attack you played this combat, deal 1 additional hit.
MINORIS-CARD027_OFFERING_OF_SOBEK.title: Offering of Sobek
MINORIS-CARD027_OFFERING_OF_SOBEK.descri: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage to ALL enemies. Exhaust 1 card from your hand. Permanently increase this card's value by that card's cost
MINORIS-CARD028_HAMMER_OF_GODS.title: Hammer of the Gods
MINORIS-CARD028_HAMMER_OF_GODS.descripti: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Can be upgraded infinitely. Upgrades made in combat are permanent.
MINORIS-CARD029_WRATH_OF_VENGEANCE.title: Wrath of Vengeance
MINORIS-CARD029_WRATH_OF_VENGEANCE.descr: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage to a random enemy{Hits:diff()}times. Repeat once for each time you were hurt this combat.
MINORIS-CARD030_PANICKED_DODGE.title: Panicked Dodge
MINORIS-CARD030_PANICKED_DODGE.descripti: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Transform a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD031_MISDIRECT.title: Misdirect
MINORIS-CARD032_TRAINING.title: Training
MINORIS-CARD033_CONSTRUCT.title: Construct
MINORIS-CARD033_CONSTRUCT.description: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Each time you play this in combat, gain +{BonusPerPlay:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold] the next time you play it this combat.
MINORIS-CARD034_ROLL.title: Roll
MINORIS-CARD035_BIND.title: Bind
MINORIS-CARD036_CAT_STEP.title: Cat Step
MINORIS-CARD037_EVADE.title: Evade
MINORIS-CARD038_PAPER_PLANE.title: Boomerang Paper Plane
MINORIS-CARD038_PAPER_PLANE.description: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Whenever you play 3 [gold]Attacks[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD039_CAT_TALISMAN.title: Cat Talisman
MINORIS-CARD040_HALFTIME.title: Halftime
MINORIS-CARD040_HALFTIME.description: If your last card played was an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain{EnergyGain:energyIcons()}.
MINORIS-CARD041_DEADLY_COFFEE.title: Deadly Coffee
MINORIS-CARD041_DEADLY_COFFEE.descriptio: Gain{EnergyGain:energyIcons()}. At the end of your turn, take{Damage:diff()}damage.
MINORIS-CARD042_ALLERGEN.title: Allergen
MINORIS-CARD042_ALLERGEN.description: This turn, whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], draw 1 card and lose 2 HP.
MINORIS-CARD043_CITY_OF_PILLARS.title: City of Pillars
MINORIS-CARD044_MINT_CANDY.title: Mint Candy
MINORIS-CARD045_COMMANDING.title: Commanding
MINORIS-CARD046_CATAPULT_START.title: Catapult Start
MINORIS-CARD047_SMALL_FREEZE_DRIED.title: Small Freeze-Dried
MINORIS-CARD048_CARDBOARD_HOUSE.title: Cardboard House
MINORIS-CARD048_CARDBOARD_HOUSE.descript: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold] per attack played this turn ({TotalBlockFinal:diff()}total).
MINORIS-CARD049_STRESS_RESPONSE.title: Stress Response
MINORIS-CARD049_STRESS_RESPONSE.descript: This turn, whenever you play a card, lose 1 HP and gain{Amount:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD050_BANDAGE_HEAL.title: Bandage Heal
MINORIS-CARD051_BUTTER_TRAP.title: Butter Trap
MINORIS-CARD051_BUTTER_TRAP.description: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. This turn, whenever you are attacked, apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] and 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to the attacker
MINORIS-CARD052_MOON_STEP.title: Moon Step
MINORIS-CARD052_MOON_STEP.description: Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw 2 cards. This turn, this costs 1 more each time you play it.
MINORIS-CARD053_ALCHEMICAL_CRUCIBLE.desc: Exhaust 2 cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], then add a random card to your [gold]Hand[/gold]
MINORIS-CARD054_DEATH_ROLL.title: Death Roll
MINORIS-CARD055_LIGHT_AS_FEATHER.title: Light as a Feather
MINORIS-CARD056_TOTH_SLATE_I.title: Toth Slate-I
MINORIS-CARD056_TOTH_SLATE_I.description: Interpret the slate. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-II".
MINORIS-CARD056_1_TOTH_SLATE_II.title: Toth Slate-II
MINORIS-CARD056_1_TOTH_SLATE_II.descript: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-III".
MINORIS-CARD056_2_TOTH_SLATE_III.title: Toth Slate-III
MINORIS-CARD056_2_TOTH_SLATE_III.descrip: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-IV".
MINORIS-CARD056_3_TOTH_SLATE_IV.title: Toth Slate-IV
MINORIS-CARD056_3_TOTH_SLATE_IV.descript: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-V".
MINORIS-CARD056_4_TOTH_SLATE_V.title: Toth Slate-V
MINORIS-CARD056_4_TOTH_SLATE_V.descripti: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-VI".
MINORIS-CARD056_5_TOTH_SLATE_VI.title: Toth Slate-VI
MINORIS-CARD056_5_TOTH_SLATE_VI.descript: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-VII".
MINORIS-CARD056_6_TOTH_SLATE_VII.title: Toth Slate-VII
MINORIS-CARD056_6_TOTH_SLATE_VII.descrip: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-VIII".
MINORIS-CARD056_7_TOTH_SLATE_VIII.title: Toth Slate-VIII
MINORIS-CARD056_7_TOTH_SLATE_VIII.descri: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw 1 card and it is Retained this combat. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-IX".
MINORIS-CARD056_8_TOTH_SLATE_IX.title: Toth Slate-IX
MINORIS-CARD056_8_TOTH_SLATE_IX.descript: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw 1 card and it is Retained this combat. Gain{Dexterity:diff()}[gold]exterity[/gold]. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-X".
MINORIS-CARD056_9_TOTH_SLATE_X.title: Toth Slate-X
MINORIS-CARD056_9_TOTH_SLATE_X.descripti: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw 1 card and it is Retained this combat. Gain{Dexterity:diff()}[gold]exterity[/gold]. Gain{Vigor:diff()}Vigor. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-XI".
MINORIS-CARD056_10_TOTH_SLATE_XI.title: Toth Slate-XI
MINORIS-CARD056_10_TOTH_SLATE_XI.descrip: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw 1 card and it is Retained this combat. Gain{Dexterity:diff()}[gold]exterity[/gold]. Gain{Vigor:diff()}Vigor. Gain{Artifact:diff()}[gold]Artifact[/gold]. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-XII".
MINORIS-CARD056_11_TOTH_SLATE_XII.title: Toth Slate-XII
MINORIS-CARD056_11_TOTH_SLATE_XII.descri: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}. Heal{Heal:diff()}HP. You may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]. Draw 1 card and it is Retained this combat. Gain{Dexterity:diff()}[gold]exterity[/gold]. Gain{Vigor:diff()}Vigor. Gain{Artifact:diff()}[gold]Artifact[/gold]. Replay 2. After combat, transform this card in your deck into "Toth Slate-XIII".
MINORIS-CARD056_12_TOTH_SLATE_XIII.title: Toth Slate-XIII
MINORIS-CARD056_12_TOTH_SLATE_XIII.descr: At the end of your turn, trigger the following effect [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s): Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]; deal{Damage:diff()}damage to a random enemy; gain{Energy:energyIcons()}; heal{Heal:diff()}HP; you may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]; gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]; draw 1 card and it is Retained this combat; gain{Dexterity:diff()}[gold]exterity[/gold]; gain{Vigor:diff()}Vigor; gain{Artifact:diff()}[gold]Artifact[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD057_EYE_CHARM.title: Eye Charm
MINORIS-CARD057_EYE_CHARM.description: Gain{Block:diff()}[gold]Block[/gold]. Until your [gold]Block[/gold] is broken, your [gold]Block[/gold] does not disappear.
MINORIS-CARD058_GATHER_STRENGTH.title: Buildup
MINORIS-CARD058_GATHER_STRENGTH.descript: Gain{Block:diff()}Block. Gain{StrengthPower:diff()}Strength. Next turn, draw{DrawExtraNextTurnPower:diff()}additional cards. Retain your hand. End your turn.
MINORIS-CARD059_FORTUNE.title: Fortune
MINORIS-CARD059_FORTUNE.description: Choose a{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|}class card and play it.
MINORIS-CARD060_KITTEN_KNIFE.title: Kitten Knife
MINORIS-CARD060_KITTEN_KNIFE.description: Whenever your Attacks deal damage, deal{KittenKnifePower:diff()}additional damage.
MINORIS-CARD061_BRONZE_GAUNTLET.title: Bronze Gauntlet
MINORIS-CARD062_TOY_CLAW.title: Toy Claw
MINORIS-CARD062_TOY_CLAW.description: At the start of your turn, add{ToyClawPower:diff()}"Scratch" to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD062_1_SCRATCH.title: Scratch
MINORIS-CARD063_CAT_SCRATCH_BOARD.title: Scratch Board
MINORIS-CARD063_CAT_SCRATCH_BOARD.descri: Whenever you play a Skill, gain{Dexterity:diff()}[gold]exterity[/gold] this turn
MINORIS-CARD064_LITTLE_BELL.title: Little Bell
MINORIS-CARD064_LITTLE_BELL.description: During your turn, whenever you lose HP, gain{Strength:diff()}[gold]Strength[/gold]
MINORIS-CARD065_GENERATOR.title: Generator
MINORIS-CARD065_GENERATOR.description: During your turn, whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain{Energy:energyIcons()}next turn.
MINORIS-CARD066_DIMENSIONAL_SCRATCH.desc: Your "Scratch" Attacks now target all enemies
MINORIS-CARD067_METRONOME.title: Metronome
MINORIS-CARD067_METRONOME.description: Whenever you play a Strike, draw 1 card
MINORIS-CARD068_SELF_TAUGHT.title: Self-Taught
MINORIS-CARD068_SELF_TAUGHT.description: Gain{Strength:diff()}Strength and{Dexterity:diff()}[gold]exterity[/gold]. At the start of your turn, draw{Draw:diff()}additional card(s)
MINORIS-CARD069_SETS_CHOICE.title: Set's Choice
MINORIS-CARD069_SETS_CHOICE.description: Choose 1 of: Sandstorm, Thunder Flash, Betrayal. Add it to your hand
MINORIS-CARD069_1_SANDSTORM.title: Sandstorm
MINORIS-CARD069_1_SANDSTORM.description: This turn, you only take 50% damage
MINORIS-CARD069_2_THUNDER_FLASH.title: Thunder Flash
MINORIS-CARD069_3_BETRAYAL.title: Betrayal
MINORIS-CARD069_3_BETRAYAL.description: At the start of your turn, choose a{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|}card from other classes. It costs 0 until played
MINORIS-CARD070_ISIS_REBIRTH.title: Isis Rebirth
MINORIS-CARD071_SOLAR_FORM.title: Solar Form
MINORIS-CARD071_SOLAR_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, add a random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|}[gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], and [gold]Power[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They cost 0 this combat, but are [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD072_BAST_BLESSING.title: Bast's Blessing
MINORIS-CARD073_APOPHIS_ARRIVES.title: Apophis Arrives
MINORIS-CARD073_APOPHIS_ARRIVES.descript: At the end of your turn, deal{ApophisArrivesPower:diff()}damage to ALL enemies. Every 3 turns, at the start of your turn, deal{ApophisArrivesPower:diff()}damage to yourself.
MINORIS-CARD074_WILD_SCRATCH.title: Wild Scratch
MINORIS-CARD075_WILD_FORM.title: Wild Form
MINORIS-CARD075_WILD_FORM.description: Set the cost of your [gold]Attacks[/gold] to 0. Your [gold]Attacks[/gold] are [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
MINORIS-CARD076_COMMAND_THE_HUNT.title: Command the Hunt
MINORIS-CARD076_COMMAND_THE_HUNT.descrip: Whenever another player plays an [gold]Attack[/gold], play it{CommandTheHuntPower:diff()}additional times.
MINORIS-CARD077_HELLO_PARTNER.title: Hello, Partner!
MINORIS-CARD077_HELLO_PARTNER.descriptio: All allies gain{Energy:energyIcons()}, draw{Cards:diff()}cards, and heal{Heal:diff()}HP.
